meta.title: Lagomplan — Travel well. Plan less
meta.description: AI-powered travel planner for those who know what they want. Full itinerary in minutes.

hero.headline: Travel well
hero.subhead: Tell us where you want to go. In minutes you have your itinerary, hotel recommendations and budget ready.

form.title: Plan your trip
form.interestsPlaceholder: Anything else? E.g. yoga, surfing, wine bars, local markets…
form.freeNote: ✦ Plan 5 trips free · No credit card needed
form.errorDestination: Where would you like to go?
form.errorPace: How would you like to travel?

howItWorks.headline: From idea to plan,
howItWorks.step1Body: Destination, dates, travel style and budget. Less than two minutes.
howItWorks.step2Body: Day-by-day itinerary, hotels, activities and budget breakdown. All in one screen.
howItWorks.step3Body: Edit, share via WhatsApp or save your plan. Unlock more with Explorer.

guides.headline: Destinations we
guides.affiliateBody: Book directly from your plan with our partners Viator and GetYourGuide

philosophy.headline: Lagom — not too much,
philosophy.body1: The Swedish concept lagom has no exact translation, but it describes exactly how a well-planned trip should feel: no impossible itinerary, no decision paralysis.
philosophy.body2: We do the heavy lifting so you can be present wherever you are.

explorer.headline: Unlimited plans
explorer.body: Your first plan is always free. When you want more — trip history, unlimited plans, downloadable PDF and priority support — Explorer delivers.

features.unlimited: Unlimited plans — no limit on destinations or trips per month
features.history: Trip history — all your plans saved and accessible anytime
features.pdf: Downloadable PDF — share your itinerary without internet or account
features.whatsapp: Private WhatsApp link — share with your group without them signing up
features.exclusive: Exclusive guides — content only for Explorer members

cta.headline: Your next trip,
cta.body: No signup. No card. The first plan is completely free.

newsletter.headline: Travel first from your inbox
newsletter.body: New ideas and guides — straight to your email.

footer.tagline: AI travel planner for those who travel with purpose.
